phase3.note: Multi-currency in a single contract. Each note binds a currency_id into its commitment (Poseidon(amount,currency_id,pk,blinding)); currencyId is public signal [7], NUM_PUBLIC=8. Admin adds assets via register_token (Token(u32) registry + TokenCount) with no contract upgrade and no new vkey. Deposit/withdraw settle Token(currency_id); transact rejects unregistered currencies.

history.phase2_note: Single-asset native-XLM pool with real-XLM settlement. Superseded by the Phase-3 multi-currency contract above. Breaking change: new commitment formula + 8 public signals + Token(u32) registry, so the tree, notes and vkey are incompatible and a fresh deployment was required.
